subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy last letter, sent by Mirza Habib, hath arrived. It is not a very long time since I wrote thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد مکتوب اخیر که بواسطه آقا میرزا حبیب ارسال نموده بودی رسید ایامی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences
